queryList.1: hp_master: select ac.address_config_id as addressConfigId, ac.country_name as countryName, ac.province_name as provinceName, ac.city_name as cityName, ac.special_city_mark as specialCityMark, haf.fence_latlng as fenceLatLng, haf.fence_name as fenceName from address_config ac left join hp_area_fence haf on haf.city_id = ac.address_config_id where ac.is_del = 0 and (haf.id > 0 or ac.special_city_mark = 1)
queryList.2: hp_master: select ac.address_config_id as addressConfigId, ac.country_name as countryName, ac.province_name as provinceName, ac.city_name as cityName, haf.fence_latlng as fenceLatLng, haf.fence_name as fenceName from address_config ac, hp_area_fence haf where haf.city_id = ac.address_config_id and ac.is_del = 0 and ac.special_city_mark = 0
queryList.3: hp_master: select u.user_name,u.user_pic,a.account_balance,i.integral,u.country,u.user_nick,u.user_telphone,u.bs,u.calling_code,uat.add_source, u.user_name_mask, u.user_telphone_mask from user u left join integral i on u.user_id=i.user_id left join account a on u.user_id=a.user_id left join user_account uat on uat.user_id = u.user_id where u.user_id=1398716816
queryList.4: hp_master: select message_id,user_id,shop_id,delivery_id,message_title,message_content ,message_type,create_time,message_status,order_sn,update_time,is_del from message where user_id=1398716816 and message_status= and is_del=0 limit 10;
queryList.5: hp_master: select evaluation_detail_id,evaluation_id,order_id,user_id,shop_id,manner,taste,composite,delivery_time,remark,evaluation_img,integral,shop_remark,shop_remark_time create_time,update_time,is_del from evaluation_detail where user_id=1398716816 and remark='' and is_del=0;
queryList.6: hp_master: SELECT rec_id,country,share_title,share_desc,invite_desc,share_img_url,user_center_img_url,pay_success_img_url,order_detail_url,bg_img_url,state,is_deleted,create_time,update_time,invite_award_sn,new_order_detail_url,user_center_desc,poster_share_desc,message_share_desc,code_poster,face_poster,activity_rule_url,wotobuy_share_desc,facebook_share_desc,facebook_share_img_url FROM hp_invite_award_config WHERE (country = '中国' AND is_deleted = 0 AND state = 1)
queryList.7: hp_master: SELECT rec_id,invite_award_sn,benefit_type,award_type,out_id,send_number,is_deleted,create_time,update_time,invitor_money,config_type FROM hp_invite_award_config_detail WHERE (invite_award_sn = '85700MC1B0' AND is_deleted = 0)
queryList.8: hp_master: SELECT rp.red_packet_id,ac.sub_state,rp.platform_bear_price,rp.merchant_bear_price,red_packet_type_id, rp.count_number,rp.send_number,ac.break_type,rp.red_packet_price,rp.fusing_sub_price,rp.shop_bear_percent, fusing_discount_rate,discount_limit,rp.threshold_price,rp.user_limit_day, rp.user_limit_day_count, rp.user_collect_num_type,rp.user_collect_num FROM red_packet rp LEFT JOIN hp_activity_config ac on rp.activity_sn = ac.activity_sn and ac.sts = 1 WHERE rp.is_del=0 and rp.effective_status = 1 AND ( rp.count_number = 0 OR rp.count_number >= rp.send_number) and rp.red_packet_id in ( 888890144 , 10097792 , 10097250 , 10096832 )
queryList.9: hp_master: select u.red_packet_id,u.red_packet_code,u.red_packet_price,u.red_packet_name,u.red_packet_name_en,u.end_time,u.start_time,u.valid_days,u.create_time, u.red_packet_type_id,u.lock_status,u.country,u.city,u.shop_id,u.threshold_price, u.valid_time_type,u.use_channel,u.delivery_distance_lower_limit,u.delivery_distance_upper_limit,u.is_tag_limit, u.is_open_time_limit as is_opne_time_limit,u.open_time_limit_string as opne_time_limit_string,u.city as redPacketCity, u.discount_rate, u.discount_limit,u.crowd,u.delivery_bear_type,u.platform_bear_price,u.merchant_bear_price,activity_sn, u.shop_bear_percent,u.platform_bear_percent, u.mutex_type,u.user_cdKey_id,u.tag_json_list,u.limit_json,u.collect_source,u.red_packet_scope_type from user_cdKey u where u.user_id=1398716816 and u.language_code in ('ALL' , 'CN') and u.is_used=0 and u.lock_status=0 and u.is_del=0 and u.`status` = 1 and u.start_time <= 1748584253389 and u.end_time >= 1748584253389
queryList.10: hp_master: select balance from user_account where user_id=1398716816
queryList.11: hp_master: SELECT count(1) from hp_voucher_order_goods_entity_list where user_id=1398716816 and `status`=0 and start_time <=1748584253 and 1748584253 < end_time
queryList.12: hp_master: SELECT id,user_id,payment_pattern,country_code,open_status,is_del,create_time,update_time FROM hp_user_no_password_pay WHERE (user_id = 1398716816 AND country_code = 'CN' AND is_del = 0)
queryList.13: hp_master: SELECT rec_id,user_id,edu_email,device_id,create_time,update_time,is_del,edu_email_mask FROM hp_user_edu_info WHERE (user_id = 1398716816 AND is_del = 0)
queryList.14: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'EDU_EMAIL_VERIFY_URL' limit 1
queryList.15: hp_master: select count(*) from hp_task_center_send_log where user_id = 1398716816
queryList.16: hp_master: SELECT m.*, me.benefit_version, me.id member_entity_id, me.delivery_remain_num, me.activity_sn, me.delivery_save_amount , me.delivery_use_num, me.derate_price,me.delivery_use_num_limit,me.platform_fee_thrift_amount FROM member_entity me LEFT JOIN member m ON m.user_id = me.user_id AND me.member_city_id = m.member_city_id WHERE m.is_finished = 0 AND m.is_del = 0 AND m.user_id = 1398716816 AND m.finish_time > 1748584253424 AND me.`member_start_time` <= 1748584253424 AND me.`member_end_time` >= 1748584253424 AND me.`is_del` = 0 AND me.`status` = 1 LIMIT 1
queryList.17: hp_master: SELECT m.member_city_id, a.address_config_id, a.city_name, m.member_price, m.save_price, m.derate_price, a.country_name, m.packet_num, m.title, m.is_open_delivery_discount, m.member_privilege_desc, m.module_activity_id, m.member_activity_name, m.popups_sts, m.popups_main_title, m.popups_sub_title, m.member_benefit, m.member_version, m.member_card_type, m.member_discount_price, m.bulletin, m.delivery_use_num, m.delivery_use_num_limit FROM member_city m, address_config a , member_city_relation r WHERE m.`member_city_id` = r.`member_city_id` AND r.city_name = a.`city_name` AND m.is_del = 0 AND a.is_del = 0 AND r.`city_name` = '九江市' AND m.online_status = 1 ORDER BY m.`create_time` DESC LIMIT 1
queryList.18: hp_master: SELECT MAX(member_delivery_price) FROM member_delivery_price WHERE is_del = 0 AND `type` = 0 AND member_city_id = 1111378
queryList.19: hp_master: SELECT 1 FROM member_delivery_price WHERE is_del = 0 AND `type` = 1 AND member_city_id = 1111378 LIMIT 1
queryList.20: hp_master: SELECT id,member_city_id,reduce_fee_type,reduce_shop_type,reduce_shop_tag_id,reduce_threshold,reduce_num_limit,reduce_type,reduce_price,status,create_time,update_time FROM member_city_fee_reduce WHERE (member_city_id = 1111378 AND status = 1)
queryList.21: hp_master: select mc.member_city_id, mc.city_id, mc.packet_num, mc.member_price, mc.save_price, mc.create_time, mc.update_time, mc.is_del, mc.derate_price, mc.title, mc.is_open_delivery_discount, mc.member_privilege_desc, mc.module_activity_id, mc.member_activity_name, mc.member_card_type, mc.member_discount_price, mc.bulletin, mc.popups_sts, mc.popups_main_title, mc.popups_sub_title, mc.member_benefit, mc.member_version, mc.delivery_use_num, mc.online_status, mc.delivery_range_limit,mc.checkout_sts,mc.auto_renew,mc.first_month_price,mc.renew_price,mc.version,mc.delivery_use_num_limit, mc.delivery_use_type,mc.delivery_use_version,mc.first_month_price_period,mc.first_pay_price,mc.first_renew_pay_price,mc.tag_id,mc.is_open_shop_packet, mc.order_price_threshold,mc.renew_info_type,mc.time_zone , mcr.city_name city_name, mcr.address_id from member_city mc, member_city_relation mcr where mc.`member_city_id` = mcr.`member_city_id` AND mc.`member_city_id` = 1111378 AND mc.is_del = 0 AND mc.online_status = 1 and mcr.is_delete = 0 order by gmt_create limit 1
queryList.22: hp_master: select user_id, tag_id, tag_value from hp_data_user_labels where user_id = 1398716816
queryList.23: hp_master: select p.*, t.id crowd_id,t.tag_name crowd_name, (select COUNT(1) from member_city_crowd_price_log l where l.member_city_crowd_price_id = p.id and l.user_id = 1398716816 and p.user_limit_num > 0) num from member_city_crowd_price p left join hp_task_center_user_tag t on p.id = t.business_id and t.business_type = 2 where member_city_id = 1111378 and p.is_del = 0 and 1748584253466 > p.start_time and p.end_time > 1748584253466 having (p.user_limit_num > 0 and p.user_limit_num > num ) or p.user_limit_num = 0 order by p.sort desc
queryList.24: hp_master: select o.* from `member_order` o left join member_entity e on o.member_order_sn = e.`member_order_sn` where o.pay_status = 1 and o.user_id = 1398716816 and e.fetch_channel in (2,3,7,8,11,12,13,14,15,16,17,18) order by o.member_order_id desc limit 1
queryList.25: hp_master: select member_order_id,member_order_sn,user_id,member_city_id,pay_way,create_time,update_time,now_pay_order_no, now_pay_message,pay_status,longitude,latitude,opreat_user_id,member_order_price,member_card_type, benefit_version,member_start_time,member_end_time,city_name,address_id,buy_type,pay_amount,valid_day,pay_time, channel_fee_amount,member_order_type,account_balance_amount,account_balance_flow_amount,renew_price,order_state, auth_type,first_month_price,last_temp_id,pay_temp_id,batch_version from `member_order` where pay_status = 1 and user_id = 1398716816 and auth_type in (1,2) and create_time > 1740808253473 limit 1
queryList.26: hp_master: select rec_id ,member_city_id ,member_benefit_type ,member_benefit_state ,title ,sub_title ,create_time ,update_time ,is_del from hp_member_center_config where member_city_id = 1111378 and is_del = 0
queryList.27: hp_master: SELECT rec_id,user_id,is_deleted, third_user_id,`type`,create_time,update_time,site,union_id from hp_user_third_login where is_deleted =0 and user_id = 1398716816 and `type` = 9 limit 1
queryList.28: hp_master: select ag.id,ag.sn,ag.name, ag.state,ag.type,ag.start_time, ag.end_time,ag.play_time_type,ag.play_time_content, ag.user_type,ag.max_times,ag.free_times,ag.is_del from hp_activity_game ag inner join hp_activity_game_city agc on ag.id = agc.game_id and agc.is_del = 0 where agc.city in ('九江市', '全部城市') and ag.is_del = 0 and ag.state = 1 and ag.type = 3 and ag.start_time <= 1748584253550 and ag.end_time >= 1748584253550 order by ag.create_time desc limit 1
queryList.29: hp_master: select id,game_id,background_img,wheel_img, pointer_img,community_img,wx_img, button_img,button_click_img,button_fail_img, share_title,share_content,share_img, share_poster,rule_url,label_content,is_del, lucky_module_img,background_color from hp_activity_games_prize_wheel where game_id=684 and is_del=0
